headline: Occidental Petroleum (OXY) Is Up 8.0% After CEO Transition And OxyChem Sale Announcement - Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: Occidental Petroleum recently announced that longtime CEO Vicki Hollub will retire this year, with COO Richard Jackson stepping into the top role while Hollub remains on the board and as an advisor to support the handover. Ahead of this leadership transition, the company also completed the US$9.70 billion sale of its OxyChem unit, sharpening its focus on core oil and gas operations and using proceeds to pay down debt. With the OxyChem divestiture refocusing capital on core energy assets,...

headline: Up 58% in 2026, Is It Too Late to Buy Occidental Petroleum?
summary: Occidental Petroleum (NYSE:OXY) has climbed 58% year-to-date, moving from $40.92 at the end of 2025 to $64.36 as of March 26. If you watched from the sidelines, the question is obvious: Is there anything left, or did you miss it? Valuation: Stretched, But Not Without Reason OXY carries a premium valuation. The stock trades at ... Up 58% in 2026, Is It Too Late to Buy Occidental Petroleum?

headline: Not Worried About an Oil Shock? Chevron CEO, Other Energy Execs Sure Are.
summary: An uncomfortable reality settled in this past week: There is no clear way to return the energy industry to its pre-Iran War state anytime soon.  High  oil prices  look like they’re here to stay and could stretch into 2027.  “The window during which you could have restarted flows, and the market goes back to normal in weeks or a month, closed pretty quickly within the first week,” said Karim Fawaz, who leads S&P Global’s energy advisory service.

headline: Occidental CEO’s Tenure May Be Ending. It Hasn’t Been Good for the Stock.
summary: Reuters reported Hollub is preparing to retire and that she will be succeeded by Richard Jackson, the company’s chief operating officer. Occidental hasn’t confirmed the report.

raw.headline: Occidental CEO’s Tenure May Be Ending. It Hasn’t Been Good for the Stock.

headline: Occidental Petroleum: Concentrate On The Acquisitions Made
summary: Occidental's accretive acquisitions, like Anadarko, gradually lower corporate breakeven over several years rather than all at once. Learn more about OXY stock here.

headline: 10-year Treasury yield is little changed after Trump extends Iran deal deadline
summary: The 10-year Treasury yield was relatively unchanged on Friday as investors continued to monitor developments in the Iran war and assess economic data.

headline: Occidental Petroleum (OXY) Soars to 52-Week High on Leadership Transition
summary: Occidental Petroleum Corp. (NYSE:OXY) is one of the 10 Stocks Investors Dominating the Market Today. Occidental Petroleum rallied for a third straight day on Thursday to hit an over 52-week high, as investors welcomed the company’s incoming leadership transition. headline: CNBC Daily Open: 'Period of destruction' paused after Iran's 'present'
summary: President Trump says he will extend a pause on Iranian energy attacks to April 6 after 10 ships were allowed passage through the Strait of Hormuz.
